case_title: NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U VS NGO, ANH VIEN AND MEO KHANH NONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, ANH VIEN AND MEO KHANH NONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGO, ANH VIEN AND MEO KHANH NONG $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $319.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ANH VIEN NGO & MEO KHANH HONG RETURNED SIGNED
